mapper.sql: select t.task_id, t.task_code, t.task_name, t.executor, t.planned_start_time, t.task_desc, t.device_id, t.route_id, t.status, t.progress, t.start_time, t.end_time, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, d.device_name, r.route_name from biz_patrol_task t left join biz_usv_device d on d.device_id = t.device_id left join biz_patrol_route r on r.route_id = t.route_id
mapper.select:
and t.task_name like concat('%', #{taskName}, '%') and t.executor like concat('%', #{executor}, '%') and t.status = #{status} and d.device_name like concat('%', #{deviceName}, '%') and date_format(t.planned_start_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d') and date_format(t.planned_start_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by t.task_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_patrol_task(task_code, task_name, executor, planned_start_time, task_desc, device_id, route_id, status, progress, create_by, create_time) values(#{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{executor}, #{plannedStartTime}, #{taskDesc}, #{deviceId}, #{routeId}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from biz_patrol_task where task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.insert: insert into biz_patrol_task_log(task_id, from_status, to_status, operate_by, operate_time, remark) values(#{taskId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operateBy}, #{operateTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select count(1) from biz_patrol_task where device_id = #{deviceId} and status in ('pending', 'running')
select count(1) from biz_patrol_task where route_id = #{routeId} and status in ('pending', 'running')
